title: Add /fast slash command to toggle fast mode
description: CC ref: commands/fast/fast.tsx:16-40 (applyFastMode), commands/fast/index.ts. CC toggles fast mode: persists userSettings.fastMode, auto-switches model if current model does not support fast mode, shows FastModePicker TUI dialog with cooldown state and pricing info. OC: command entirely absent. Parent spec: #539.
